HeroSection.heading:
Web Agency
E-Commerce
Marketing
HeroSection.description: We design e-commerce and corporate websites built to reflect your brand, streamline navigation, and maximise conversions. Demanding design, solid development, business vision, and long-term support.

BrandsSection.subtitle: Stories that connect us
BrandsSection.heading: We support hundreds of brands, across all industries.
BrandsSection.description: For 25 years, Tapilla has merged technical expertise and Retail culture (40 years of group experience) to propel ambitious brands. We offer comprehensive support: upstream consulting, elite production, and post-launch performance monitoring.

FaqSection.subtitle: We clarify it all, no jargon
FaqSection.heading:
WE ANSWER YOUR
QUESTIONS, SIMPLY
FaqSection.description: Before working together, it's normal to have questions. Here are the answers to the most common ones — and if you have more, get in touch :)

faq1.q: Why choose an e-commerce agency like Tapilla?
faq1.a: We combine 25 years of tech expertise with deep retail culture. From strategy to post-launch optimisation, our full-stack team delivers measurable growth — not just pretty pages.

faq2.q: What is your technical expertise on Shopify and Shopify Plus?
faq2.a: We're certified Shopify Plus Partners. Our developers build custom themes, headless storefronts, complex checkout flows, and third-party integrations that scale with your business.

faq3.q: How does your CRO and Data agency optimise my sales?
faq3.a: We run continuous A/B tests, heatmap analyses, and funnel audits. Every recommendation is backed by data — so changes drive real revenue, not guesswork.

faq4.q: How do you activate customer loyalty via CRM and Klaviyo?
faq4.a: We design automated email and SMS flows — from welcome series to win-back campaigns — using Klaviyo's segmentation engine to deliver the right message at the right moment.

faq5.q: Does Tapilla build institutional websites on Webflow or WordPress?
faq5.a: Yes. For brands that need a corporate or editorial site alongside their store, we build on Webflow or WordPress with the same attention to design, performance, and SEO.

AgencyPage.subtitle: The Agency
AgencyPage.heading: PASSIONATE ABOUT BRANDS AND DIGITAL TRANSFORMATION
AgencyPage.description: At Tapilla, we believe above all in encounters and ideas that come to life through people. For over 20 years, we have been accompanying brands on their digital adventure, combining creativity, expertise and attention to detail. Each project is a shared story, built on trust, passion and the desire to always go further.

Mission.subtitle: Our Mission
Mission.heading: CREATING VALUE IN EVERY DIGITAL PROJECT
Mission.description: At Tapilla, our mission is to transform our clients' ambitions into lasting digital successes. We combine expertise, creativity and innovation to imagine high-performance e-commerce solutions, designed for today and ready for tomorrow. Driven by people, excellence and integrity, we design projects that engage, inspire and create real value.

Differences.label: Our differences
Differences.heading: A SOLID EXPERIENCE, NOURISHED BY A CONSTANT CURIOSITY
Differences.description: Growing from 30 to over 130 collaborators while keeping our lively and bold spirit — that's the challenge we meet every day. At Tapilla, we believe in evolving, never ceasing to question ourselves. Our capacity to innovate, learn and progress is an integral part of our DNA — and it's what makes us proud, as much as our achievements.

approach.title: Our approach
approach.subtitle: Combining performance and creativity
approach.description: At Tapilla, we believe that digital success is born from the balance between technical rigor and creative freedom. Every project is conceived as a unique collaboration, guided by high standards and attention to detail. We don't just create websites — we build platforms that bring brands to life and turn visitors into loyal customers. Our mission: to combine strategy, design and technology to create high-performing, sustainable and inspiring solutions.

history.title: Our history
history.subtitle: An expertise built on trust and time
history.description: For over twenty years, we have been shaping digital projects with the same demand: that of work well done. Over the years, we have built precise methods, solid processes and a culture of detail that secure every stage of the projects we support. This experience, forged over time, allows us today to approach our clients' challenges with serenity, precision and vision.

team.title: Our team
team.subtitle: A collective adventure above all
team.description: Behind each project, there are passionate women and men, driven by a shared desire: to help brands grow with meaning and creativity. Our richness is the diversity of our talents — developers, designers, strategists, marketers — who unite their know-how to build strong and lasting projects. At Tapilla, collaboration isn't just a buzzword — it's our way of thinking, creating and moving forward together.

onTime.title: On Time
onTime.subtitle: We respect your time and your required deadlines. Our process is built to deliver on schedule. We plan ahead, communicate proactively and track each milestone, so you know what's happening and when.

onBudget.title: On Budget
onBudget.subtitle: We don't believe in surprises and unexpected costs. We ensure that the scope of work is clearly and carefully defined, communicated and approved upfront before work begins. We're transparent and stick to the budget throughout the entire engagement.

proactive.title: Proactive
proactive.subtitle: Whether we have completed a task or modified a timeline, our team keeps you constantly updated at every point within your project or engagement to ensure you are always aware of the status.

conversionFocused.title: Conversion-Focused
conversionFocused.subtitle: We're a conversion-focused agency. Every decision we make is influenced by what we can do to maximize your conversion rate and use Shopify and BigCommerce to its full potential.

bespoke.title: Bespoke
bespoke.subtitle: We build fully custom solutions tailored to your brand and customer that are strategically defined to meet your requirements, solve your pain-points and maximize your growth.

specialized.title: Specialized
specialized.subtitle: We're a specialized, in-house, senior-level team that is trained and certified on the platforms and technologies we are partnered with. Each team member is skilled and experienced in eCommerce strategy, design, development and optimization.

transparent.title: Transparent
transparent.subtitle: You'll always know the status of your project or engagement and the dependencies, assumptions and risks they bring. From project milestones and financials to deliverables and timelines, we provide full transparency into every aspect.

partnerPreferred.title: Partner Preferred
partnerPreferred.subtitle: Our success is tied to yours. We invest in long-term partnerships with our clients, providing ongoing support, optimization, and strategic insights well beyond the build.

ServicesPage.subtitle: To each brand, its own digital story
ServicesPage.heading: SERVICES DESIGNED TO SUPPORT YOUR PROJECTS
ServicesPage.description: At Tapilla, every project starts with a story — yours. We imagine, design and develop tailor-made digital ecosystems — from e-commerce sites to marketing strategy, through design and content management. Our mission: create online experiences that reflect your world, serve your ambitions and sustainably support your growth.

Footer.ctaHeading:
WE HELP
BRING YOUR
PROJECTS TO LIFE.
Footer.companyDescription: Tapilla serves clients worldwide. Our team is based in Paris and Lyon, France.
